title: dt-pilot reflected config catalog
description: Schema for config/catalog/catalog.settings.json — the curated list of Dynatrace settings 2.0 schemas and classic-API config types that dt-pilot ships scaffolds for.

id.description: Dynatrace settings 2.0 schema ID (e.g. builtin:alerting.profile), classic-API id (e.g. auto-tag), or a per-channel subtype using the 'parent/subtype' shape (e.g. builtin:problem.notifications/email).

family.description: Coarse grouping. modules/configs/ groups scaffolds by family for discoverability.

scope.description: Default scope for the generated scaffold. Override per-config when authoring.

summary.description: One- or two-sentence description of what configs of this type do.

commonParameters.description: Parameter names the generator should pre-declare in the scaffold's config.yaml. The user fills in values when adopting the scaffold. Each entry is interpolated into a YAML key and a JSON property name, so it must match the parameter-name pattern (start with a letter, contain only letters, digits, and underscores).
